title: Create: Wizardry
description: This is an addon mod for Create adding enhanced compatibility with Iron's Spells and Spellbooks. Happy spellcasting!
body:
This is an addon mod for Create adding enhanced compatibility with Iron's Spells and Spellbooks. 

Requirements: This mod requires Create and Iron's Spells and Spellbooks (Of course)

New Automations: 

- All types of Ink, each one requiring the previous tier (Common, Uncommon, Rare, etc.)
- Cinder Essence
- Arcane Essence

All recipes found in the gallery using JEI. JEI is also heavily recommended.

Near Future Plans/Indev:

- ~~Adding Ink and Mana as Create fluids~~ - Done!
- Adding a Spell Turret and its necessary components
- ~~Adding fluid compatibility with Create: Enchantment Industry~~ - Done!

Please visit my Discord for progress updates: https://discord.gg/9j5QYM7TtK

Happy spellcasting!
